sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66456" key="mesoma/zion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσο-μάζιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n66456.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">space between the breasts</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:51:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.51.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
